'''Tofu''' is a food item that gives you 4 hunger points.

{{Item
| name = 
| image = Tofu.png
| id = tofu
| type = Food
| Subtype = Soy
| Properties = Hunger points: 4/10
| stackable = 8
| Description = Suitable for Vegans!
}}

Your dog can also eat this, so don't be shy to share it with your furry pal!
==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe
|-
|[[Soy Milk]]
|[[File:Tofu crafting.png|336x336px]]
|}
==Usage==
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
==Used in==
*[[Aburaage]]
*[[Miso Soup]]
==Trivia==
*It was added in DTN 1.18.0.
